tools.name: fetch_url_content
tools.description:
Fetch and extract clean text content from a public URL.
    Returns: {title, text, url, word_count}

tools.name: extract_article
tools.description:
Extract main article content from a news/blog URL.
    Returns: {title, description, body, author, date}

tools.name: get_page_links
tools.description:
Extract all links from a page.
    Returns: {links: [href], internal_count, external_count}

tools.name: get_page_metadata
tools.description:
Get metadata from a page: title, description, og tags, keywords.
    Returns: {title, description, keywords, og_title, og_image, og_type}
